conservative.name: Sermon
conservative.requirements: Your subjects must be able to see and hear you; the sermon takes several minutes to tell

success.description: Drawing on your faith, you deliver a homily appropriate to the current situation. If appropriate, you influence your audience
As above, and while pursuing goals along parallel lines to your sermon, your audience gains the Inspired condition for the remainder of the act

bane.description: Add to future Social actions against the same subjects

reckless.requirements: Your subjects must be able to see and hear you; the sermon takes several minutes to tell

success.description: Drawing on your faith, you deliver a homily appropriate to the current situation. If appropriate, you influence your audience

bane.description: Add to future Social actions against the same subjects

chaosStar.description: Your audience gains the Demoralised condition for the remainder of the act

sigmarsComet.description: While pursuing goals along parallel lines to your sermon, your audience gains the Inspired condition for the remainder of the act
